Video.summary: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?
Video.title: Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Image.alt: Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Video.summary: Donnie's wife disappeared with his cousin for hours and refused to take his phone calls; another parent told Angelina that her boyfriend was cheating with a prostitute.
Video.title: Your Story Is Shady

Image.alt: Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady
Your Story Is Shady

Video.summary: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?
Video.title: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Image.alt: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Video.summary: Misguided youth ... 15-year-old Gala is having some serious and dangerous issues with race and her mother Tanya believes she needs to change. Her out of control behavior has her sneaking out of the house, sleeping around with older men, and skipping school. Gala argues this is the way she was raised, but her mother blames Gala's boyfriend Patrick. With her behavior escalating, Steve's trying everything he can for one last attempt to open her mind.
Video.title: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Image.alt: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Video.summary: A young child suffered serious life-threatening injuries, but not only is the mother Jessica considered a suspect, but her boyfriend Major and grandma Crystal are also under investigation! Find out the jaw dropping truth today!
Video.title: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?

Image.alt: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?
3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?
3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?

Video.summary: Cammie is here to find out once and for all if her ex sexually abused their 2-year-old daughter. Her doctor’s examination showed signs of sexual abuse. Her ex denies these allegations. But what will Steve’s lie detector test reveal?
Video.title: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Image.alt: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It

Image.alt: She Deserves It
She Deserves It
She Deserves It

Video.summary: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.
Video.title: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Image.alt: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Video.summary: Nathan currently has 4 children with 2 different women and is in a serious mountain of trouble. Jamie, his first baby's mother, is tired of his lasting neglect for their 3 kids and needs him to step up to the role.
Video.title: You Call Yourself A Father?

Image.alt: You Call Yourself A Father?
You Call Yourself A Father?
You Call Yourself A Father?

Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Image.alt: DNA: It's Your Baby
DNA: It's Your Baby
DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next When Teresa's boyfriend asked her to have a threesome, she had no idea he was having an ongoing affair!
Video.title: Leave It To Springer!

Image.alt: Leave It To Springer!
Leave It To Springer!
Leave It To Springer!

Video.summary: Jeff met Chrissy during a beer robbery, but he never imagined she’d be sexually aggressive! Now he wants out! Shawn has to come clean to his fiancée Latisha after his one night stand! Tyrell is over Jill and ready to be with her godsister, Nicky!
Video.title: You're Not Leaving Me!

Image.alt: You're Not Leaving Me!
You're Not Leaving Me!
You're Not Leaving Me!

Video.summary: John's one moment of weakness may cost him everything; Antonio meets his online crush; Paige tries to make her boyfriend forgive her for cheating by offering him a threesome.
Video.title: WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday

Image.alt: WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday
WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday
WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday

Video.summary: Pamela is here today to tell her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon. Next Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda’s 62-year-old mother! Then Brandi will tell her fiancé that she's been having an affair with twin brothers!
Video.title: Wild Affairs!

Image.alt: Wild Affairs!
Wild Affairs!
Wild Affairs!

Video.summary: Amanda's a workaholic mother losing her grasp on a 3rd marriage and in desperate need of help.Then Daniel's learning that all it takes to ruin an engagement is one bad night as his brief love affair with his fiancee's mother is back to haunt him!
Video.title: Mad Mom Meltdown

Image.alt: Mad Mom Meltdown
Mad Mom Meltdown
Mad Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Chyna confronts her backstabbing "friend"; Jarod says the stress of being the sole breadwinner for his family has driven him down the path of adultery; Derrick proposes to his ex-girlfriend, who is already married.
Video.title: Proposals Backfire

Image.alt: Proposals Backfire
Proposals Backfire
Proposals Backfire

Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Image.alt: Transtastic Confessions
Transtastic Confessions
Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!
Video.title: Unforgivable Secrets!

Image.alt: Unforgivable Secrets!
Unforgivable Secrets!
Unforgivable Secrets!

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Image.alt: You Can't Tear Us Apart!
You Can't Tear Us Apart!
You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Athena is here to tell her fiancé that she is cheating, and that she poses nude on the Internet. Next Monica is cheating with her husband's best friend! Later Billy will admit to his girlfriend that he's been having an affair with her best friend.
Video.title: Sex Betrayals

Image.alt: Sex Betrayals
Sex Betrayals
Sex Betrayals

Video.summary: Trisha Goddard continues her on-going series, Teen Girls: Bad Choices. Meet a 15-year old girl who claims she’s a pimp and is having relationships with men and women. Can Trisha intervene in time?
Video.title: Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!

Image.alt: Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!
Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!
Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!

Video.summary: Tiffany’s daughter Katie has been fighting, doing drugs, and possibly prostituting herself. Lakeesha wants to make sure her daughter doesn’t make the same mistakes she did! Can Trisha help these unruly girls change before it is too late?
Video.title: Wild Teens And Their Bad Behavior Confronted!

Image.alt: Wild Teens And Their Bad Behavior Confronted!
Wild Teens And Their Bad Behavior Confronted!
Wild Teens And Their Bad Behavior Confronted!

Video.summary: Linda aka Ms. Jackson is 55 years old and still dresses sexy. Her daughter-in-law and grand-daughter Marsell and Antyenelte believe she is in dire need of a make-over and needs to tone down the clothing. But Linda isn't trying to hear that.
Video.title: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Image.alt: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Video.summary: In a special series, “Trisha Uncut”…Meet Greg an aspiring rap artist who wants 27 children of all different races and ethnicities with 9 different women, but his girlfriend Nicole is 3 months pregnant and wants to know if he’s cheating with groupies!
Video.title: Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!

Image.alt: Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!
Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!
Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!

Video.summary: Octavia wants to prove to her boyfriend, Mark, that he is the father of her 2-month old baby even though she cheated on him. And later, Tamara wants to prove to her ex-boyfriend, Thomas, that he is the father of her 5 year old son.
Video.title: 3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?

Image.alt: 3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?
3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?
3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?

Video.summary: 21-year old Ashley says that her mom Jesseca's husband, which she met online, is a serial cheater. Then, are Amy and JD being torn apart by insecurity or infidelity? Will the truth be revealed in the lie detector tests?
Video.title: Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!

Image.alt: Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!
Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!
Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!

Video.summary: Shantel has been a self-proclaimed gold-digger since the age of 15. Now she has become a “cyber gold digger” by getting money from men online. And later, Bella is a Financial Dominatrix. Bella’s best friend Mark says that enough is enough.
Video.title: The Truth Comes Out…Stop Lying About Your Sex Job!

Image.alt: The Truth Comes Out…Stop Lying About Your Sex Job!
The Truth Comes Out…Stop Lying About Your Sex Job!
The Truth Comes Out…Stop Lying About Your Sex Job!

Video.summary: Shara is devastated that her teen daughter Jenna is wild and out of control. Then, Tee says her 15-year old daughter Aalana is heading down a path of self-destruction. Aalana even abuses her sister CiCi because she thinks her mother favors CiCi more.
Video.title: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Image.alt: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Video.summary: One week after Ralph was murdered, his parents received a call from a woman named Candy claiming that Ralph was the father of her 20-month old daughter. Then, Kiel is accusing Terri of cheating with several men including his own family members.
Video.title: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Image.alt: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Video.summary: Recently Shandora found evidence that her boyfriend David had been cheating. When she confronted him, David blamed it on Pete. Later, aspiring singer Sassy met music producer Chris and he promised to make her a star. Instead of music, they made love.
Video.title: My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?

Image.alt: My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?
My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?
My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?

Video.summary: Christina wants to take a lie detector test to prove that her fidelity and get her relationship and home back! Then, Lillian is certain that her husband William has been cheating due to his outrageous lies. Has he been cheating or is Lillian crazy?
Video.title: I Need To Reveal My Sex Life Today!

Image.alt: I Need To Reveal My Sex Life Today!
I Need To Reveal My Sex Life Today!
I Need To Reveal My Sex Life Today!

Video.summary: Eddie wants to marry Naomi, but before he can do that he must confess his secrets. Will Naomi stay with Eddie once she hears what he has to say? And later, Rolisha claims her boyfriend DJ has a wandering eye.
Video.title: My Double Life Ends Today …I'm Ready to Tell the Truth!

Image.alt: My Double Life Ends Today …I'm Ready to Tell the Truth!
My Double Life Ends Today …I'm Ready to Tell the Truth!
My Double Life Ends Today …I'm Ready to Tell the Truth!
